display_text: Satanic, Cost: 5050: Core Strength carry item providing a powerful defensive active ability. Unholy Rage grants 175% Lifesteal for 6 seconds, healing for massive amounts of damage dealt. The 30% passive lifesteal provides sustained survivability. Essential for turning fights and sustaining through heavy damage. Stats: Active CD: 30s, Active Lifesteal: 175% for 6s, Passive Lifesteal: 30%.

display_text: Satanic, Cost: 5050: Stat profile focuses on durability and damage output for strength-based cores. Grants +25 Strength for health and damage, +25 flat damage, and permanent 30% lifesteal. The strength bonus synergizes with the lifesteal by increasing health pool and attack damage.

display_text: Satanic, Cost: 5050: Team fight role is that of a defensive sustain and reversal tool. The active Unholy Rage allows a core hero to absorb immense focus fire and heal back to full health through damage. This turns losing engagements and forces enemies to commit significant control or damage to secure kills.

display_text: Satanic, Cost: 5050: Situational against high physical damage lineups. The massive lifesteal active directly counters heroes relying on high sustained physical DPS. It provides limited value against heavy burst magic damage or instant disables that prevent you from attacking. It is a counter to physical damage cores.

display_text: Satanic, Cost: 5050: Synergizes with heroes who have high attack speed and damage output to maximize lifesteal value. Strength cores like Sven or Chaos Knight benefit greatly from the stat and defensive utility. It is also a key late-game survivability item for agility carries when paired with Butterfly or Skadi.
